linkedin_data.about:
I’m a React Native / TypeScript developer based in Melbourne, building and shipping mobile apps with Expo + Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, RLS).

Recently, I built and published GeoAttend (location-aware attendance + QR fallback) and validated reliability in testing (25/25 successful proximity check-ins with 0 false unlocks). I’ve also built:

FeelFit: AI-assisted fitness coaching with voice output (OpenAI API + AWS Polly)

Restaurant Inventory: OCR → structured parsing → editable confirmation UI → Supabase upsert (Google Vision OCR + OpenAI)

【What I’m good at】

-Turning messy requirements into clean, working features

-Mobile UX that stays responsive (latency/caching, practical state management)

-Security-minded implementation (Auth, role-based access, RLS policies)

Owning the whole cycle: build → test → iterate → ship

【Tech I use】
React Native, Expo, TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, SQL, Supabase/Postgres, Git/GitHub, OpenAI API, Google Vision OCR, AWS Polly.

I’m currently open to Software Engineer Intern / Junior Developer / Frontend Developer roles (mobile-first, but happy to work across the stack).

If your team needs someone who can ship, learn fast, and bring strong business communication from a sales background, feel free to message me.… moreTop skillsPython (プログラミング言語) • React Native • Node.js • SQL • JavaScript
